---
title: "Ammar Eltigani"
subtitle: "PhD Student in Mathematics"
---

::: {.hero-image}
![](images/profile.png){fig-alt="Profile photo of Ammar Eltigani" width="240"}
:::


## Biography

I am a first-year PhD student in Mathematics at the **University of Michigan**. I earned my Master's in Mathematics also from the University of Michigan in 2026, and did my undergraduate degree in Mathematics and Computer Science at **Williams College**.

I am interested in probability, analysis, and the mathematics of data science.

## Recent Updates

- **August 2026:** I will be attending a [summer school on high-dimensional probability](https://sites.northwestern.edu/highdimensionalprobability2026/) at Northwestern.
- **June 2026:** I attended a really fun [summer school on random matrices](https://sites.google.com/umich.edu/rmtschool) at the University of Michigan.
- **May-Present 2026:** I organized a graduate reading group at the University of Michigan on SDEs.
- **April 2026:** I earned my Master's degree through the [Marjorie Lee Browne program](https://lsa.umich.edu/math/graduates/GraduateStudentHandbook/doctoral-programs/the-marjorie-lee-browne-scholars-program.html)! As part of this, I did a reading with [Jinho Baik](https://sites.lsa.umich.edu/baik/) on interactions between random matrix theory and machine learning. [This](blog/posts/mlb-reading/) blog post contains a short write-up.
- **Jan-April 2026:** I participated in a learning seminar on the basics of random matrix theory.
- **Jan 2026:** I passed my PhD Qualifying Review exams!



## Teaching Experience

### University of Michigan

#### Instructor of Record

- **Math 115: Calculus I**, Fall 2024, Winter 2025.
- **Math 116: Calculus II**, Winter 2026, Fall 2026.

### Williams College

#### Teaching Assistant

- Abstract Algebra, Applied Real Analysis, Algorithm Design and Analysis, Data Structures and Advanced Programming.

## Mentoring and Outreach

- Last summer (2025), I mentored undergraduate students as part of the [MaCSS](https://sites.lsa.umich.edu/macss-scholars/) program, overseeing two data science projects and helping out with probability basics.

## CV

[Download PDF CV](files/cv.pdf){.button .button-primary}

Last updated: April 2026.

## Contact

Email: `altigani@umich.edu`  
Office: East Hall, University of Michigan  
GitHub: [ammareltigani](https://github.com/ammareltigani)  
Google Scholar: [Profile link](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=3uzn-m0AAAAJ)
